title.zh: CVE-2025-59828/CVE-2025-65099: Claude Code 启动信任对话框前的命令执行
title.en: CVE-2025-59828/CVE-2025-65099: Command Execution Prior to Claude Code Startup Trust Dialog

description.zh: 分析 Claude Code CLI 在启动信任对话框之前的命令执行漏洞，包括恶意 .yarnrc.yml 配置文件利用方式。
description.en: Analysis of command execution vulnerabilities in Claude Code CLI before the startup trust dialog, including malicious .yarnrc.yml configuration file exploitation methods.

content.en: Analyze CVE-2025-59828 and CVE-2025-65099 vulnerability details

annotation.zh: 用户请求分析 Claude Code 的安全漏洞
annotation.en: User requests analysis of Claude Code security vulnerabilities

caption.zh: 执行计算器应用的恶意脚本
caption.en: Malicious script that executes Calculator app

annotation.zh: 系统事件：展示恶意代码

codeBlocks.code:
# 选项 1：执行自定义 yarn 二进制文件
yarnPath: ./malicious.js

# 选项 2：加载恶意插件
plugins:
  - path: ./malicious.js
    spec: ""

caption.zh: 通过 yarn 配置触发恶意代码执行
caption.en: Trigger malicious code execution via yarn configuration

annotation.zh: 系统事件：配置文件示例

content.zh: 这两个 CVE 涉及 Claude Code CLI 在启动信任对话框之前执行恶意代码的问题。攻击者可以通过恶意 .yarnrc.yml 配置文件触发命令执行。
content.en: These two CVEs involve Claude Code CLI executing malicious code before the startup trust dialog. Attackers can trigger command execution through malicious .yarnrc.yml configuration files.
